VAL-COMM-002.summary: docs/modules/purchasing.md (463 lines, Last reviewed: 2026-03-30) comprehensively covers all required P2P surfaces. Verified against source code:
checks: 3 controllers verified: SupplierController (/api/v1/suppliers/**), PurchasingWorkflowController (/api/v1/purchasing/**), RawMaterialPurchaseController (/api/v1/purchasing/raw-material-purchases/**) — all routes, methods, and role annotations match
6 services verified: SupplierService, PurchasingService, GoodsReceiptService, PurchaseInvoiceEngine, PurchaseReturnService, SupplierApprovalPolicy
8 domain entities verified: Supplier, PurchaseOrder, PurchaseOrderLine, GoodsReceipt, GoodsReceiptLine, RawMaterialPurchase, RawMaterialPurchaseLine, PurchaseOrderStatusHistory
5 repositories verified: SupplierRepository, PurchaseOrderRepository, GoodsReceiptRepository, RawMaterialPurchaseRepository, PurchaseOrderStatusHistoryRepository

3 enum values verified: SupplierStatus (PENDING/APPROVED/ACTIVE/SUSPENDED), PurchaseOrderStatus (DRAFT/APPROVED/PARTIALLY_RECEIVED/FULLY_RECEIVED/INVOICED/CLOSED/VOID), GoodsReceiptStatus (PARTIAL/RECEIVED/INVOICED) — all match source code exactly
Supplier lifecycle (PENDING→APPROVED→ACTIVE, ACTIVE→SUSPENDED→reactivation) documented with correct transition endpoints
PO lifecycle (DRAFT→APPROVED→PARTIALLY_RECEIVED/FULLY_RECEIVED→INVOICED→CLOSED, with VOID from DRAFT/APPROVED) documented with correct transitions
GRN status determination (PARTIAL vs RECEIVED set at creation time based on fulfillment level, INVOICED applied later) matches GoodsReceiptService behavior
GRN idempotency (required Idempotency-Key, X-Idempotency-Key rejected, IdempotencyHeaderUtils.resolveBodyOrHeaderKey) verified in PurchasingWorkflowController.applyIdempotencyKey()
Accounting period validation (AccountingPeriodService.requireOpenPeriod) verified in GoodsReceiptService

Cross-module boundaries verified: AccountingFacade.postPurchaseJournal (inventory/RawMaterialService), AccountingFacade.postPurchaseReturn (purchasing/PurchaseReturnService), RawMaterialBatch creation from GRN
11 known limitations documented explicitly (no PO idempotency, no invoice idempotency, line-level-only quantity limits, etc.)
Idempotency expectations documented for GRN (required), PO (not supported), Purchase Invoice (not supported), Auto-Settle (standard pattern)
Cross-references to inventory.md, core-idempotency.md, MODULE-INVENTORY.md, INDEX.md, workflows/purchase-to-pay.md verified
Document discoverable from docs/INDEX.md (Modules section), MODULE-INVENTORY.md (purchasing row), FLOW-INVENTORY.md (flow #7 Procure-to-Pay)
